payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Front-facing rectangular cabinet door made of dark-stained wood with a recessed central panel and visible vertical wood grain; matte finish with a small light reflection near the upper-left, no hardware or knobs visible, largely fully visible within the crop and approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
